entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The cereal crop being bred for productivity impacts in farmers' fields

entities.name: SORGHUM BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing improved sorghum varieties to create impacts in farmers' fields

entities.name: IMPROVED SORGHUM CULTIVARS
entities.description: Varieties of sorghum developed through breeding to enhance productivity and stability

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area, which can be increased by improved cultivars

entities.name: PER UNIT COST OF PRODUCTION
entities.description: The expense incurred to produce a specific unit of the crop, which can be reduced by improved cultivars

entities.name: STABILITY OF YIELD
entities.description: The consistency of crop yield across different environments or years, which can be increased by improved cultivars
